{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Nebula Runners' ship
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Nebula Runners' ship]] has a cargo bay escape pod.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
